resultList.dtldesc: Luxury living awaits in this exquisite 3 BHK flat for sale at Ashoka Liviano, Nanakramguda, Hyderabad. Thoughtfully designed with premium finishes, this residence offers a sophisticated blend of comfort and style.::::::Property Specifications::::::Experience the charm of semi-furnished living in this spacious 3 BHK flat spanning 2,155 sq. ft., located on the 3rd floor of a 14-floor building. Designed for a harmonious lifestyle, this east-facing, Vaastu-compliant home offers an ideal blend of functionality and style.::::::The flat features three bedrooms with attached western-style bathrooms, including geysers in two of them. Enjoy the fresh breeze from three balconies—two attached to the bedrooms and one extending from the living room, offering views of the road and surrounding buildings. The separate living and dining areas enhance the sense of space, while a dedicated puja room or store room caters to your additional needs.::::::The modular kitchen comes equipped with a chimney, a convenient piped gas connection, and an attached utility area, making daily chores a breeze. Reputed schools like DPS are within 3 km, while KIMS Hospital is just 5 km away. Daily essentials are easily accessible with Ratnadeep supermarket within 500 meters, and banks/ATMs nearby. Public transport, including buses and autos, is readily available, with Raidurg Metro Station located 7 to 8 km away for seamless commuting.::

resultList.dtldesc: 2 BHK Flat For sale in Rainbow Vistas at Rock Garden, Hitech City, Hyderabad. This vaastu compliant 2 BHK flat is ideally located in Rainbow Vistas at Rock Garden, Hitech City, Hyderabad. It is east-facing, offering a harmonious and peaceful living environment.::::::::::::Property Specifications:::::::::::: With a super built-up area of 1250 sq-ft, this apartment is located on the 9th floor of a 19-storey building. The unit is semi-furnished with wardrobes, fans, and lights, ensuring a well-equipped space for immediate occupancy.::::::::::::The apartment comprises two well-sized bedrooms and two bathrooms, with one attached to the master bedroom and the other serving as a common bathroom. Both bathrooms are equipped with western-style fittings, and one is fitted with a geyser for your convenience. A spacious living and dining area provides ample space for family gatherings, while a balcony attached to the living room offers a serene garden view, perfect for unwinding.::::::::::::A modular kitchen with a chimney and a piped gas connection adds convenience to the cooking experience, while a utility area attached to the kitchen offers extra storage and space for laundry. The store room provides additional storage space, keeping your home organized. The apartment boasts vitrified tiles flooring, which is durable and easy to maintain.::::::::::::Facilities ::::::::::::The building offers a wide range of amenities, including a clubhouse, swimming pool, gymnasium, and park. For added convenience, there is reserved parking, water storage, maintenance staff, laundry service, and internet/Wi-Fi connectivity. The property is Vaastu compliant and features essential services like intercom facility, service/goods lift, and waste disposal. Enjoy leisure activities with the banquet hall, bar/lounge, cafeteria/food court, and even a conference room for business purposes. Outdoor enthusiasts can make use of the multipurpose courts, tennis courts, recreational pool, and volleyball court.:::::::::::: Locality ::::::::::::The locality of the property adds to its appeal, with landmarks such as Ashoka One  Mall nearby. The Creek School is 1 km away, making it ideal for families. Medical care is easily accessible with Amore and Yashodha Hospitals within a 3 km radius. For shopping, Ratnadeep Supermarket is within the community, while banks and ATMs are also conveniently located within walking distance. Public transport options are abundant, with the Bharat Nagar Railway Station and Hitech City MMTS Metro Station both approximately 3 km away.::::::::::::This apartment is a perfect blend of comfort, convenience, and modern living, ideal for those looking to invest in a well-connected and feature-rich property.
